home.welcome: Welcome to my portfolio! I'm a developer passionate about building modern web applications.
home.name: Wali Sylla
home.description: I'm Wali, a full-stack developer passionate about web application development and new technologies. My curiosity and eagerness to learn drive me to see every project through with precision. Thanks to my diverse experiences (professional, athletic, etc.) and my adaptability, I easily integrate into a team and fully commit to challenges and goals.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Project Selection
projects.sectionDescription: Here's a selection of projects I've worked on. Feel free to click on the links to learn more!
projects.categorieTitle: Browse my projects organized by technologies

htmlCss.title: HTML/CSS
htmlCss.description: Projects built with core web technologies: HTML5 and CSS3. These projects focus on semantic structure and responsive design.

jsVanilla.title: Vanilla JavaScript
jsVanilla.description: Applications developed in pure JavaScript, without frameworks. These projects demonstrate my mastery of language fundamentals and DOM manipulation.

react.title: React
react.description: Modern web applications built with React. These projects illustrate my ability to create interactive and performant user interfaces.

reactNative.title: React Native
reactNative.description: Cross-platform mobile applications developed with React Native. These projects showcase my expertise in mobile development.
